---
title: "Matrix Multiplication"
author: "Daibik Barik (Bmat2316)"
date: "2025-08-13"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

\section*{4>}

\subsection*{(e)}
```{r}
P <- matrix(c(0.2, 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 0.6, 0.4, 0.2, 0),
            nrow = 3, ncol = 3)
print(P)

P2 = P %*% P #denotes matrix multiplication
print(P2)

P3 = P2 %*% P
print(P3)

P4 = P3 %*% P
print(P4)
```
